# Changelog

This file records customer-facing ZelixLens ROBLOX Edition releases. Exact assets
and publication times will remain available on the
[GitHub Releases page](https://github.com/Zaroomx/ZelixLens-Roblox-Releases/releases).

## Unreleased

- Initialized the separate binary-only ROBLOX Edition release repository.
- Prepared Roblox-specific launcher branding and KeyAuth access flow.
- Added independently signed GitHub update metadata with rollback protection.
- Added public verification, privacy, support, security, and license documents.

No production binary release has been approved yet.

## Release policy

- Customer versions use unique semantic-version tags such as `v1.0.0`.
- Published assets are not replaced in place; changed bytes require a new version.
- Published releases are retained to provide an auditable update history.
